goal: Build a backend and runtime harness for small-model tool-use ability, starting with reminder tools.
principles: Standard messages + tools + assistant.tool_calls + role=tool format.
Assistant must never fabricate tool results.
Keep progress logs and feature status updated after each implementation step.

features.name: Create project skeleton
features.description: Create app, scripts, tests, and data directories with minimal Python package structure.
features.verification: Repository contains app/, scripts/, tests/, data/ and imports do not fail.

features.name: Define reminder data model
features.description: Define Reminder and structured result models using Pydantic or dataclasses.

features.name: Implement JSON reminder storage
features.description: Persist reminders in data/reminders.json with safe read/write helpers.
features.verification: Storage tests can create, read, update, and delete records without corrupting JSON.

features.name: Implement create_reminder
features.description: Create reminders from time_text, task, and target. Return missing_fields if required fields are absent.

features.name: Implement query_reminder
features.description: Query reminders by time_text, task, both, or neither. Return structured matches.

features.name: Implement delete_reminder
features.description: Delete reminders by reminder_id, time_text, task, or combined filters. Return ambiguous when multiple reminders match.

features.name: Implement update_reminder
features.description: Update reminder time/task by reminder_id or filters. Return ambiguous when multiple reminders match.

features.name: Define canonical tool registry
features.description: Create OpenAI-compatible tool schemas for create, query, update, and delete reminders.

features.name: Implement tool executor
features.description: Validate assistant tool_calls, parse JSON arguments, execute backend functions, and return role=tool messages.

features.name: Implement FastAPI backend
features.description: Expose health, tools, tool execution, and reminder CRUD endpoints.

features.name: Implement mock model runtime loop
features.description: Use mock assistant outputs to test the full tool-use loop without needing a real model.

features.name: Implement local model call script
features.description: Call a local model or inference server with messages and tools, parse tool_calls, execute tools, and generate final answer.

features.name: Implement tool-use training data exporter
features.description: Export standard JSONL training examples with messages, tools, assistant.tool_calls, and role=tool results.

features.name: Add no-tool negative examples
features.description: Add examples where user chats, shares feelings, or mentions time without requesting a reminder, and the assistant should not call tools.
features.verification: Training data statistics include no_tool scenarios.

features.name: Add malformed tool-call handling
features.description: Handle malformed JSON arguments, unknown tool names, and missing required parameters gracefully.

features.name: Add local popup reminder watcher
features.description: Poll reminders JSON and trigger local popup when active reminders become due; mark reminder as notified to avoid duplicate popups.

features.name: Add benchmark prompt generation and end-to-end evaluation runner
features.description: Generate diverse benchmark prompts via LLM API and run isolated per-sample tool-use evaluation against local checkpoints with storage delta checks.
features.verification: python -m py_compile app/benchmark_eval.py scripts/generate_benchmark_prompts.py scripts/run_benchmark_eval.py && pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_eval.py

features.name: Add device intent and slot extraction data exporter
features.description: Export device-control intent/slot samples without reminder tools or assistant.tool_calls.
features.verification: pytest -q tests/test_device_intent.py tests/test_export_device_intent_data.py && python scripts/export_device_intent_data.py --output data/device_intent_data.jsonl

features.name: Add diverse device intent dataset generator
features.description: Generate rich device-control intent/slot training data with API-backed utterance generation and non-intent negative examples.

features.name: Add device intent web demo with simulated postprocess
features.description: Run a standalone web demo that checks whether a fine-tuned model recognizes device-control intents and updates a simulated GUI state for the 13 supported capabilities.

features.name: Add device intent dataset statistics script
features.description: Summarize an existing device intent JSONL dataset with scenario, capability, intent, negative ratio, missing slot, source, error, and duplicate utterance distributions.
